title: MiscPack
description: A Modpack with some random Mods.
body:
# MiscPack
Has some fun and game breaking mods in it.

## Enchantments

- Soulbound
- Your tools are with Unbreaking 3 **unbreakable**
- Every Protection Entchantment on Armor possible
- More Sword, Trident and Axe Enchantments
- Mending is op but unneeded. ;-)

## Storage
- Expanded Storage

## More!

**So much more!!**

Have fun with it.
